manifest.author: ioannisxirouxakis
manifest.changelog:
ioannisxirr's Instafel backup v65

2 weeks full of consequent updates let's go!!!🔥🔥🔥

- Added a quick search suggestion in comments.
- You can now speak to Meta AI with your voice just like you do in Gemini Live. Press the blue button on the bottom right!
- You can now send videos to Meta AI and it will analyse them.
- Increased how many media you can send at bulk in Meta AI.
- You can now create animated collages in stories in a form of sequential photos or cutouts (the cutout option is really cool!).
- Minor changes and clean-ups.
manifest.name: ioannisxir's Instafel Backup
manifest.description: Yeah, most popular backup in the world!
